governs: ADR 0024 (guardrail: difficulty restores discrimination, never forces a result)

bar.primary: mean_delta(triage_C - triage_A) > 0, clustered by seeded substrate (6), 95% t-CI as confidence (strong iff lower bound > 0)
bar.fp_guard: clean substrates: mean_FP_C <= mean_FP_A + 1.0 prosecutor-confirmed non-real findings/cell; win + guard fail = INCONCLUSIVE-spray
bar.judge_policy: opus pipeline is the bar's basis; grok-4.5 re-grade of all seeded-cell judgments is the second headline; disagreement on the bar => JUDGE-SPLIT verdict

cost.pilot: 1 A + 1 C on T1 before the gate
cost.note: gate: cost_gate --cells 48 --pilot-cost-usd <A> <C> --ceiling-usd 60; runtime backstop resumable; pre-screen (6 bare cells) + pilot excluded from counted cells
